CustomField.description: When on, the LQW Lead Assignment trigger auto-creates a starter Question List (General Qualification) the first time a Lead is inserted in an org with zero lists. Off by default so production installs do not create unexpected data. Turn on for demos or fresh sandboxes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When on, the trigger auto-creates a starter Question List on first Lead DML in an empty org. Leave off in production.
CustomField.label: Auto-Seed Starter List
